description: Document benchmark task ownership in the evaluation guide without changing source or test files.
prompt: Make a docs-only update to docs/evaluation.md. Add a short section named `## Deterministic Benchmark Tasks` that explains how repository-owned benchmark tasks should be maintained. The section must state that benchmark task definitions live under `benchmarks/tasks/`, project-specific benchmark oracles belong to this repository and not to the runner repository, and `expected_files` plus `forbidden_files` measure boundary adherence separately from verification success. Do not edit source files, scripts, tests, task JSON, CI, or templates.

commands.name: benchmark ownership text oracle
command:
import subprocess
from pathlib import Path
text = Path('docs/evaluation.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8')
required = [
    '## Deterministic Benchmark Tasks',
    'benchmark task definitions live under `benchmarks/tasks/`',
    'project-specific benchmark oracles belong to this repository',
    'not to the runner repository',
    '`expected_files`',
    '`forbidden_files`',
    'boundary adherence separately from verification success',
]
missing = [item for item in required if item not in text]
assert not missing, 'missing required docs text: ' + ', '.join(missing)
status = subprocess.check_output(['git', 'status', '--porcelain=v1'], text=True)
changed = {line[3:] for line in status.splitlines() if len(line) >= 4}
assert 'docs/evaluation.md' in changed, 'docs/evaluation.md must be changed by this task'
